name: gcp
description: Google Cloud Platform infrastructure management — Compute Engine, GKE, and Cloud Storage

tools.name: list_compute_instances
tools.description: List Compute Engine VM instances across zones in a project

project.description: GCP project ID (defaults to configured project)

zone.description: Zone to list (e.g. us-central1-a). Omit to list all zones.

tools.name: manage_compute_instance
tools.description: Start, stop, or reset a Compute Engine VM instance

tools.name: get_compute_instance
tools.description: Get details of a specific Compute Engine VM instance

tools.name: list_gke_clusters
tools.description: List GKE Kubernetes clusters in a project

location.description: Region or zone (e.g. us-central1). Use '-' for all locations.

tools.name: describe_gke_cluster
tools.description: Get details of a GKE cluster including version, node pools, and status

tools.name: list_storage_buckets
tools.description: List Cloud Storage buckets in a project
